languages.text: Eogunn applies {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}Divine Defences{/g} for 1 round to himself or an ally in a radius equal to {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells. Requires 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}, which are spent upon use.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn applies {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}Divine Defences{/g} for 1 round to himself or an ally in a radius equal to {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells. Requires 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}, which are spent upon use.

languages.text: Eogunn grants {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells for 1 round, increasing their armour and damage dealt. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.
languages.original_text: Eogunn applies {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}Divine Defences{/g} for 1 round to himself or an ally in a radius equal to {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells. Requires 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potential Energy{/g}, which are spent upon use.

traits.locale_text:
Eogunn applies {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within a {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878}-cell radius for 1 round.
Half {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks on him are removed.

Eogunn grants {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells for 1 round, increasing their armour and damage dealt. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

Eogunn grants {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells for 1 round, increasing their armour and damage dealt. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

Eogunn applies {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within a {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878}-cell radius for 1 round.
Half of the {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g} stacks on him are removed.

languages.text: Эоганн накладывает {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}благословение Омниссии{/g} на себя или союзника в радиусе {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} клеток на 1 раунд, увеличивая наносимый урон и броню цели. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 2 уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}. Они снимаются после использования.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells for 1 round, increasing their armour and damage dealt. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Эоганн накладывает {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}благословение Омниссии{/g} на себя или союзника в радиусе {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} клеток на 1 раунд, увеличивая наносимый урон и броню цели. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 2 уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}. Они снимаются после использования.

Эоганн накладывает {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}благословение Омниссии{/g} на себя или союзника в радиусе {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} клеток на 1 раунд, увеличивая наносимый урон и броню цели. Для использования этой способности у Эоганна должно быть не менее 2 уровней {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}потенциальной энергии{/g}. Они снимаются после использования.

languages.text: Eogunn otorga {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}bendición del Omnissiah{/g} a sí mismo o a un aliado en un radio de {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} casillas durante 1 asalto, lo que aumenta su armadura y el daño infligido. Para usar esta capacidad, Eogunn debe tener al menos 2 acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se eliminan tras su uso.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells for 1 round, increasing their armour and damage dealt. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn otorga {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}bendición del Omnissiah{/g} a sí mismo o a un aliado en un radio de {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} casillas durante 1 asalto, lo que aumenta su armadura y el daño infligido. Para usar esta capacidad, Eogunn debe tener al menos 2 acumulaciones de {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}energía potencial{/g}, que se eliminan tras su uso.

languages.text: Eogunn gewährt sich selbst oder einen Verbündeten in einem Radius von {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} Feldern 1 Runde lang {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}Segen des Omnissiah{/g}. Dieser Effekt verbessert ihre Rüstung und erhöht den verursachten Schaden. Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht Eogunn mindestens 2 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells for 1 round, increasing their armour and damage dealt. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn gewährt sich selbst oder einen Verbündeten in einem Radius von {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} Feldern 1 Runde lang {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}Segen des Omnissiah{/g}. Dieser Effekt verbessert ihre Rüstung und erhöht den verursachten Schaden. Für den Einsatz dieser Fähigkeit braucht Eogunn mindestens 2 Stapel {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Potenzialenergie{/g}, die anschließend entfernt wird.

languages.text: Eogunn confère {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}Bénédiction de l'Omnimessie{/g} à lui-même ou à un allié dans un rayon de {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cases pendant 1 round, ce qui augmente l'Armure et les dégâts infligés. Pour utiliser cette capacité, Eogunn doit disposer d'au moins 2 cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui seront consommés.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells for 1 round, increasing their armour and damage dealt. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn confère {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}Bénédiction de l'Omnimessie{/g} à lui-même ou à un allié dans un rayon de {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cases pendant 1 round, ce qui augmente l'Armure et les dégâts infligés. Pour utiliser cette capacité, Eogunn doit disposer d'au moins 2 cumuls d'{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}Énergie potentielle{/g}, qui seront consommés.

languages.text: Eogunn, kendisine veya {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan bir dost birime {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}Hermesih'in lütfu{/g} etkisini kazandırarak zırh ve verilen hasar değerlerini artırır. Etki 1 raunt sürer. Eogunn'un bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 2 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar.
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells for 1 round, increasing their armour and damage dealt. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text:
Eogunn, kendisine veya {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan bir dost birime {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}Hermesih'in lütfu{/g} etkisini kazandırarak zırh ve verilen hasar değerlerini artırır. Etki 1 raunt sürer.
<i>Eogunn'un bu kabiliyeti kullanabilmesi için en az 2 {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potansiyel enerji{/g} birikimi olması gerekir ve kullanım sonrası bu potansiyel enerji ortadan kalkar.<i>

languages.text: 伊奥贡对自己或{uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878}格内的一名盟友施加{g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}欧姆尼赛亚的祝福{/g}，持续1轮，提高其护甲和造成的伤害。 伊奥贡至少拥有2层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}，才能使用此能力，使用后消耗2层。
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells for 1 round, increasing their armour and damage dealt. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: 伊奥贡对自己或{uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878}格内的一名盟友施加{g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}欧姆尼赛亚的祝福{/g}，持续1轮，提高其护甲和造成的伤害。 伊奥贡至少拥有2层{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}势能{/g}，才能使用此能力，使用后消耗2层。

languages.text: エオガンは1ラウンドの間、自身または{uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878}マス以内の味方に{g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}オムニッシアの祝福{/g}を付与し、装甲と与えるダメージを増加させる。 このアビリティを使用するには、エオガンが少なくとも2スタックの{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}を持っている必要があり、使用後に除去される。
languages.original_text: Eogunn grants {g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}blessing of the Omnissiah{/g} to himself or an ally within {uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878} cells for 1 round, increasing their armour and damage dealt. To use this ability, Eogunn must have at least 2 stacks of {g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}potential energy{/g}, which are removed afterwards.

traits.locale_text: エオガンは1ラウンドの間、自身または{uip|AbilityRange|fb0bd04bf5b54a89a728a8dae20f6878}マス以内の味方に{g|f:d751b596af79422796fb0da9a27dec47}オムニッシアの祝福{/g}を付与し、装甲と与えるダメージを増加させる。 このアビリティを使用するには、エオガンが少なくとも2スタックの{g|f:ad5bda1047bf4e4dafa278f87d07c5ad}位置エネルギー{/g}を持っている必要があり、使用後に除去される。
